quests.name: Q10: The Drowned Idol
quests.description: Carry the ancient fragments one by one to the pedestals — the shrine allows no greed. Break the wards, claim the whale idol and slay Gorgatha.

objectives.description: Take ancient fragments from the Reliquaries (one at a time!)
Deposit each fragment at a different Pedestal
Slay Melax the Swift-Footed (immune until all fragments rest!)
Map 2: claim the Golden Whale Statuette (Armed Kharos)
Map 2: slay Akheilos (immune without the statuette!)
